title: [Warehouse, Alcove]
description: Tall, tightly arranged stacks of crates make walls to three sides, while a curtain keeps anyone from seeing your activity here in this alcove.

wayto.14119: ;e room = Room.current.id;fput 'go opening'; if ( room == Room.current.id ); fput 'close locker';move 'go opening'; end; $go2_restart = true
